overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a sunlit urban industrial district. The player enters a concrete underpass, exits into a derelict area with abandoned vehicles, and continues through a mixed industrial-residential neighborhood toward a wooden house.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a concrete tunnel entrance between modern buildings

entered.detail: large rectangular tunnel entrance set between concrete retaining walls
tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade
angled concrete wall with red painted curb at base
metal utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunlit urban street with the camera walking toward a dark concrete tunnel entrance. Modern glass buildings rise on the right while a concrete retaining wall lines the left side of the road.

events.description: enters dark concrete underpass from bright outdoor street
approaching tunnel exit, bright sunlight becomes visible at end of tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
rough concrete walls with graffiti and drainage pipes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow concrete underpass illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The walls show water stains and graffiti as the camera progresses toward the bright exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area with abandoned vehicles and watchtower

events.description: large truck exits tunnel and passes by on the right
turns left to face abandoned vehicle area with watchtower structure

agents.ego_description: exits the tunnel, pauses as a truck passes, then turns to explore the abandoned vehicle area

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck driving out of the tunnel and passing by the camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical concrete tower with external lighting fixtures
derelict green sedan with missing wheels behind green railing
rusted blue van with open doors and damaged body
dense network of electrical wires suspended between tall pylons

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into bright sunlight, the camera encounters a large truck passing by before turning toward an industrial yard. A concrete watchtower stands prominently amid abandoned and derelict vehicles enclosed by green railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overpass and warehouse buildings

events.description: passes under a concrete overpass while continuing down the road
black sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the cracked asphalt road through the industrial district, passing abandoned cars and utility poles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: elevated highway overpass crossing perpendicular to the street
long low industrial building with corrugated metal walls
tall advertising billboard with illuminated display surface

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along an industrial road passing under a concrete overpass. Abandoned vehicles line the left side while utility poles and wires dominate the skyline. A black sedan drives past as the camera approaches a large billboard structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed industrial-residential area with standalone houses

events.description: transitions from industrial street to residential area with wooden houses
turns right and approaches a two-story wooden house with exterior stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the mixed neighborhood and approaching a specific wooden house with a porch and exterior stairs

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden house with covered porch and external staircase
concrete staircase leading up to the house entrance with metal railings
large vertical billboard with purple and pink neon advertisement
tall modern residential tower with grid-patterned facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a mixed-use area where industrial buildings give way to residential structures. The camera approaches a weathered two-story wooden house with a covered porch and external stairs, while a modern skyscraper with a bright neon billboard looms in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright urban street through a dim industrial underpass and into a derelict neighborhood. It begins by walking along a sunlit road flanked by glass buildings and a concrete wall, moving steadily toward the dark mouth of a tunnel. As the camera enters the narrow underpass, the natural light vanishes, replaced by flickering overhead fluorescent lights and graffiti-covered walls before the view opens back up into a blindingly bright exit. The scene then shifts into an industrial yard filled with abandoned vehicles and a concrete watchtower, proceeding under a heavy overpass where utility wires crisscross the sky and a black sedan drives past. Finally, the industrial landscape gives way to a mixed-use residential area, with the camera approaching a weathered two-story wooden house while a neon-lit skyscraper looms in the distance.
